title: syntherisma badia
side_effects: Syntherisma badia can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, nausea, and diarrhea in some individuals. Overconsumption of the plant's extracts can lead to liver damage and kidney failure due to its toxic compounds. In rare cases, prolonged use of the plant can cause hallucinations, erratic behavior, and even coma. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the syntherisma badia plant for any health benefits.
